use_cases: Animated hero section text that reveals character-by-character
Brand name or logo reveal animation for landing pages
Decorative animated headings for marketing websites
Loading or transition animations between content sections
Eye-catching call-to-action text with visual appeal
ai_summary: An SVG-based text animation component that creates a path-drawing effect where text is progressively revealed through stroke animation over 8 seconds. Features a pink-to-red gradient stroke on bold typography with smooth spline easing. Perfect for hero sections, brand reveals, or decorative animated headings where you want to capture attention with a smooth text-drawing visual effect.
